title: Micro Affinity Group
description: Service-level request/response contract for POST /micro-affinity-groups. Cross-collection alignment to application-architecture service nodes is enforced after schema validation. MAG write identity is based on micro_ag_id plus environment; architecture_version remains required for architecture lookup and payload validation.

architecture_version.description: Required application architecture version used for enrichment lookup. It is preserved in stored MAG documents but is not part of the MAG write identity.

environment.description: Environment boundary that participates in the MAG write identity together with micro_ag_id.

workloads.description: Workload IDs must be unique within a request. Architecture lookup rules are enforced outside JSON Schema.
